sqlMap.insert: insert into board(title, pass, name, content, hits, rdate) values( #title#, #pass#, #name#, #content#, 0, now() )
sqlMap.select:
select unq, title, pass, name, content, hits, date_format(rdate, '%Y-%m-%d') as rdate from board where 1=1
and $searchCondition$ like '%$searchKeyword$%'
order by unq desc limit #recordCountPerPage# offset #firstIndex#

select count(*) totcnt from board where 1=1
and $searchCondition$ like '%$searchKeyword$%'
select unq, title, name, content, date_format(rdate, '%Y-%m-%d') as rdate from board where unq = '$unq$'
sqlMap.update: update board set hits=hits+1 where unq = #unq#
update board set title=#title#, name=#name#, content=#content# where unq=#unq#
sqlMap.select: select count(*) from board where unq=#unq# and pass=#pass#
sqlMap.delete: delete from board where unq=#unq# and pass=#pass#
